articles.description: BBC Sport senior football correspondent Sami Mokbel analyses a summer that promises plenty of change in the Premier League.
articles.title: Premier League managers: Man Utd, Chelsea, Newcastle, Fulham, Crystal Palace latest

articles.description: Lamine Yamal will miss the rest of Barcelona's season with a hamstring injury but he is expected to return for Spain at the World Cup.
articles.title: Lamine Yamal to miss rest of Barcelona season but expected to be fit for World Cup

articles.description: China prepares for the last-16 match between Ding Junhui and Zhao Xintong – the country's first ranking event winner and trailblazer against its first - and the defending - world champion.
articles.title: 2026 World Snooker Championship: Zhao Xintong v Ding Junhui could break TV viewing records

articles.description: Fifa stands by comments made last week by president Gianni Infantino in which he said that "the Iranian team is coming, for sure".
articles.title: World Cup 2026: No Fifa plan to swap Iran and Italy after Trump envoy asks for switch

articles.description: Luke Littler strengthens his grip on a play-off place in the Premier League with an impressive 6-1 win over Jonny Clayton.
articles.title: Premier League Darts 2026: Luke Littler beats Jonny Clayton to win in Liverpool

articles.description: George Russell tells BBC Sport how he would enjoy more competition for the F1 title and why his approach to racing is the same as when he was 10 years old.
articles.title: George Russell on wanting a title fight with Max Verstappen, his love of competition and the 'positives' of the 2026 cars

articles.description: New Zealand all-rounder Suzie Bates will retire from international cricket after this year's Women's T20 World Cup, ending an illustrious 20-year career.
articles.title: Suzie Bates: New Zealand great to retire from internationals after 2026 Women's T20 World Cup

articles.description: The NFL Draft begins on Thursday, with Fernando Mendoza a huge favourite to be the first pick, but who are the other prospects to look out for?
articles.title: NFL Draft 2026: Dates, UK times, how it works & who gets first pick?

articles.description: Enzo Fernandez is wanted by Manchester City, Aston Villa identify James Trafford as a potential Emiliano Martinez replacement and Manchester United are keen on Micky van de Ven.
articles.title: Football gossip: Fernandez, Van de Ven, Martinez, Sancho, Anderson, Diomande, Terzic, Leao, Ponomarenko

articles.description: Iran's Hossein Vafaei becomes the first qualifier to win at the 2026 World Championship, beating China's Si Jiahui to set up a tie with Judd Trump.
articles.title: 2026 World Snooker Championship: Hossein Vafaei first qualifier to win at Crucible this year
